seoTitle: Adelong vs Adjungbilly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Adelong and Adjungbilly. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Adelong and Adjungbilly.
heading: Adelong vs Adjungbilly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Adelong, New South Wales and Adjungbilly, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Adelong has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Adjungbilly (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Adelong or Adjungbilly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Adelong has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Adjungbilly scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Adelong scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Adjungbilly scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Adelong or Adjungbilly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Adelong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
